name: python3-pygccxml
title: python3-pygccxml
summary: specialized XML reader reads the output from gccxml - python3 lib
description:
specialized XML reader reads the output from gccxml - python3 lib
The purpose of pygccxml is to read a generated file and provide a
simple framework to navigate C++ declarations using Python classes.
.
This package provides the Python 3 module that can be imported for uses.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pygccxml because specialized XML reader reads the output from gccxml - python3 lib.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pygccxml as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pygccxml with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pygccxml --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
